feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: 4chan danced in front of the class today. The demoncrat teacher was so triggered…
entry.content: 4chan danced in front of the class today. The demoncrat teacher was so triggered he actually called me a nigger!

entry.title: /int/ International: "I think there is a resurgence of antipolonism because at this moment gojżyn hav…
entry.content: "I think there is a resurgence of antipolonism because at this moment gojżyn have not yet learned how to be based and redpilled incel chuds. And I think we [Lechites] are going to be part of the [leading] role, of [leading] Europe into this chudcel world. But again, there must be a transition and the transition will not be easy. And I think that the Poles will be at the center of that. It’s a huge transformation for Europe to make. They are now going into a based and redpilled chud ethno-nationa

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I just admire your beauty and your people. I don't have any romantic interest in…
entry.content: I just admire your beauty and your people. I don't have any romantic interest in you, I just wish I were you It's fascinated how you defeated the Roman Empire and built civilizations greater than it. Today, you're richer than Mediterranean countries. You're also more beautiful than them. I'm just a Luso-Shitzilian against my will, I'll never be like you. If I could choose my body, I'd choose to be you, but I can't because this world is trash. You're lucky, I'm the one who should kill myself, not

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I wish I wasn't born in Canada it's an awful degenerative wasteland I'm not real…
entry.content: I wish I wasn't born in Canada it's an awful degenerative wasteland I'm not really sure about what race I wish I was, because mostly spending lots of time thinking about stuff like that is a complete waste of time and completely impractical. I guess I just wish I had a giant dick, a genius I.Q. and physically adept and good at things like sports. That would be cool. But then that's why I wish I wasn't born on the continent at all. I wish I was born in a magical kingdom, like Hyrule or something

entry.title: /mu/ Music: A rather ordinary-sounding white Southern boogie band, except that this one has …
entry.content: A rather ordinary-sounding white Southern boogie band, except that this one has its roots in pop--they began as the Candymen, the greatest cover band in history. Only they actually began as Roy Orbison's backup band. As you might imagine, they're tighter and slicker than your ordinary boogie band, which all things considered is a small boon. I hope somebody on Capricorn covers "Wrong." And I hope they find something as good as, oh, "Good Vibrations" to cover themselves. C+

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I'm a Communist, I've read Marx, and I'm a full supporter of class struggle, I'm…
entry.content: I'm a Communist, I've read Marx, and I'm a full supporter of class struggle, I'm even a member of the CPUSA. But, I suppose because of the domination fetish I have, I always find myself fantasizing about being an extreme leftist activist participating in labor organizations, workers' strikes, etc, fighting against capital, then going to the hotel room reserved by the bourgeois old man who's going to dominate me. I want to be dominated by a bourgeois, old, fat, powerful man, literally sodomized.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: So I am thinking of getting a controller: I am thinking between GameSir Cyclone …
entry.content: So I am thinking of getting a controller: I am thinking between GameSir Cyclone 2 , GAMESIR G7 PRO and Flydigi Vader 5 Pro as they have almost the same price in my country and they have almost the same functionality too, which is a bit strange. My target is PC only, but i do not know if i would use turbo or macros so its all a bit hard to decide. I guess I want a general controller tier list and discussion thread.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: STOP! TELL ME WHAT YOU PLAYED THIS WEEK!
entry.content: Or you're a faggot. I've been playing Command & Conquer: RA1, Quake 3, Ninja Gaiden 2, GTA Vice City, CS: Source with bouts of Gears of War 3, and Dead Rising 2. Personally, I think DR2 is superior to DR1, and GoW3 is superior to the series overall. This goes for Quake 3, and maybe Vice City - as I think San Andreas is quite fun, but suffers from bloat. But what about you?

Is there a law where the writer is punished if the worker or the maid is the main character?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Movie tropes based on reality
entry.content: >took my glasses off because it rained a lot while I was commuting and forgot to bring my wipes waiting for them to dry >suddenly co-workers start chatting with me a lot more >suddenly get 4x in a row clients who nearly immediately buy the crappy contracts im selling them >put my glasses back on >co-workers quit yapping and suddenly clients actually start pushing back on my offers Damn wtf, the movies didn't lie. I really need to switch to contacts.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Why is Steam too lazy to fix Fallout 3 so it can be played on windows 11 without…

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: denis villeneuve and his films
entry.content: What are your favorite films of his? really really like lots of his stuff and i think his run from 2013-2017 is one of the best run of films by any director. Sicario is probably my favorite of his. I thought dune was ok, and im just so bored by part 2 that i cant finish it despite trying a few times. him being locked into three of these cocksuckers is such a waste of his talent. 1998-on Earth 2000-Maelström 2009-Polytechnique 2010-Incendies 2013‐Prisoners 2013-Enemy 2015-Sicario 2016-Arrival 201

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Soviet Russia and the USSR essentially had a fully socialized, state run economy…
entry.content: Soviet Russia and the USSR essentially had a fully socialized, state run economy from the revolution in 1917 to it's collapse in 1991. Despite small reforms such as the New Economic Policy from 1921-28, the Kosygin Reforms in 1965 and Perestroika from 1985-91, the state owned and controlled almost all industry. Under a socialist economy, it went from a borderline medieval agrarian society to a space faring, industrialised superpower. The history and development of the USSR is socialism's greates

entry.title: /o/ Auto: How hard is it to replace "The Big Seven" on an XJ?
entry.content: Pic rel is mine and I think I need to replace the battery terminals and most of the large wires. I am buying a replacement kit for these wires to attempt to fix a starting issue, but it is going to be a long process for me. I watched some guy on YouTube do it but I really have no idea what I am doing. My experience with wiring and soldering is zero.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I'm a Communist, I've read Marx, and I'm a full supporter of class struggle, I'm…
entry.content: I'm a Communist, I've read Marx, and I'm a full supporter of class struggle, I'm even a member of the CPUSA. But, I suppose because of the domination fetish I have, I always find myself fantasizing about being an extreme leftist activist participating in labor organizations, workers' strikes, etc, fighting against capital, then going to the hotel room reserved by the bourgeois old man who's going to dominate me. I want to be dominated by a bourgeois, old, fat, powerful man, literally sodomized.

entry.title: /news/ News: Republicans demand America burn
entry.content: https://newrepublic.com/post/212717 /republicans-donald-trump-hoards-ca sh-midterms President Donald Trump is sitting on a more than $350 million war chest, but Republicans are starting to feel shortchanged, Politico reported Monday. MAGA Inc., a pro-Trump super PAC, hasn’t spent directly on a race since March, when it spent $17,900 to back Georgia Representative Clay Fuller’s campaign. Since then, MAGA Inc. has only given $560,000 to MAGA KY, which used it to back Ed Gallrein’s challenge agains

entry.title: /g/ Technology: If you try to check who starred a project on GitHub from a user's profile, the l…
entry.content: If you try to check who starred a project on GitHub from a user's profile, the link 404s. If you try to click the stars or watchers from the project page, you can't because they're no longer links. https://github.com/torvalds

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: July 6th, 2026 state of the crisis
entry.content: I thought the crisis would be over. But you know, it is like when you think something has gone away, but then it came back a second time to finish you off for good. I don't know, I feel like I am at my social, physical and moral end and I have no idea how to deal with the pressure. There will be a last crackdown coming from July 20 to 22, after which I earnestly wish that this arduous and overwhelming struggle might find it's end. I only hope that, after this, I will be still here, for my mother

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Which do you prefer, Linux or Android, for Chinese emulation handhelds? I've onl…
entry.content: Which do you prefer, Linux or Android, for Chinese emulation handhelds? I've only had Linux handhelds until I got the RG Rotate, and Android seems like the obvious win for me. It's so much easier to set up and scrap games.

I was embarrassed but I think she might be into me. Should I ask if I can touch her boobie?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: THE NEW “SHOOT YOURSELF WITH AN AK-47” TREND HAS GOT SOME PARENTS CONCERNED.
entry.content: There’s a new trend that has been on the rise where the participants have to shoot themselves in the head with an AK-47, this has some parents concerned over the dangers of this trend, victims often experienced very painful headaches after attempting the challenge, and upwards to twenty four people have lost their life attempting this trend, while fifteen people were hospitalized.
